warnings: Gmsh/OCC runtime is unavailable; using audited shared-node Hex8 production fallback.

limitations: Global equilibrium solve remains the 1.0 compact linear-static kernel in this basic release.
Mohr-Coulomb state is tracked through staged control metadata and material readiness gates.

warnings: Native Gmsh/OCC runtime is unavailable; deterministic Tet4 surrogate was used with explicit physical tags.

limitations: The global tangent is assembled by the compact staged kernel; Mohr-Coulomb updates are applied as a deterministic constitutive correction layer.
This 1.1.3-basic path is suitable for regression and engineering workflow validation, not certification-grade design sign-off.

metadata.purpose: Ensure startup shows six-phase computation workflow, not the old flat editor.
